scripts.start: yarn build && xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 17' 2>/dev/null || true && open -a Simulator && APP=$(find build -name 'EnrichedMarkdownExample.app' -path '*Debug-iphonesimulator*' | head -1) && xcrun simctl install booted "$APP" && xcrun simctl launch booted swmansion.enriched.markdown.ios.example
